description_long: This object is a stylized grave monument featuring a central tombstone with a cross at the top, flanked by two symmetrical, low stone barriers connected by heavy, square-linked chains. The tombstone is rectangular with beveled edges and a slightly arched top, and it sits on a solid stone base. The front and back faces of the tombstone display engraved inscriptions, though the text is partially worn and difficult to read. The stone barriers extend outward in a gentle arc, each ending in a blocky pedestal that anchors the chains. The entire structure is constructed from a dark, weathered stone, giving it a somber and aged appearance. The chains and pedestals add a sense of enclosure and protection to the grave site.
description: A weathered stone grave monument with a cross-topped tombstone, flanked by chained stone barriers and engraved inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cross-topped tombstone, engraved inscription, and both chained stone barriers extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tombstone and the linear arrangement of the chained barriers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back inscription on the tombstone and the symmetrical layout of the chains and barriers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the stone elements and the chain links' attachment to the pedestals.
